name: Activity Feed
description: The factory timeline: folds noteworthy events (fired rules, work orders, safety stand-downs, quality alerts, completed production orders, energy spikes, low-stock crossings, certification gaps, AI insights) into a per-tenant, newest-first activity feed — a live chronological record complementing the Company Brain's knowledge base.
author: FactoryOS

api.description: A tenant's most recent activity-feed entries, newest first; optionally narrowed to one category (case-insensitive).
Activity-feed headline for a tenant: total kept and a per-category tally, ordered by count descending.
